text:
……こんなところね。
結構、息が合ってきたと思う。

……連携能力を高めるには
何度も積み重ねていくしかないわ。
それもアークスのつとめ、だから。

……それじゃ、一度戻りましょう。
帰還したら、私の所まで来

That should do it. I would say we are working
together quite well.

The only way to improve team coordination is
through practice and repetition.
That is our calling as ARKS operatives.

This will do for now.
Come see me once you return.
